tests.test_name: Story file upload populates story input

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user uploads a story file and verifies the story input is populated with the filename displayed, while the Check Coverage button remains disabled until test cases are also provided.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Story file upload populates story input
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Story input is populated, story filename is shown, and Check Coverage button remains disabled without test cases

tests.test_name: Test case file upload populates test input

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user uploads a test case file and verifies the test input is populated with the filename displayed, while the Check Coverage button remains disabled until a story is also provided.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Test case file upload populates test input
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a test case file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Test input is populated, test case filename is shown, and Check Coverage button remains disabled without a story

tests.test_name: Pasting a story that exceeds the character limit shows an error

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user pastes content exceeding the 50,000 character limit into the story input and sees an error indicating the pasted text is too long.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasting a story that exceeds the character limit shows an error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User pastes 50001 characters into the story input
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A paste error message containing 'too long' is displayed

tests.test_name: Pasting a story at exactly the character limit is accepted

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user pastes content at exactly the 50,000 character limit into the story input and verifies no error is shown and the input is successfully populated.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasting a story at exactly the character limit is accepted
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User pastes 50000 characters into the story input
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: No paste error is shown and the story input is populated

tests.test_name: Uploading an unsupported file type to the story input shows an inline error

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user uploads a file of an unsupported type to the story dropzone and verifies an inline error is shown while the story input remains empty.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Uploading an unsupported file type to the story input shows an inline error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads an unsupported file to the story input
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Story dropzone shows an unsupported file type error and the story input remains empty

tests.test_name: Dropping multiple files onto the test case input shows a dismissible warning

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user drops multiple files onto the test case input, sees a multi-file drop warning with the input remaining empty, and then dismisses the warning successfully.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Dropping multiple files onto the test case input shows a dismissible warning
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User drops multiple files onto the test case input, then dismisses the warning
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A multi-file drop warning is shown and the test input is empty; after dismissal the warning is no longer visible
